name: Zenco Duo Glassware
summary: The Zenco Duo Glassware serves as the primary accessory for containing vapour from the Zenco Duo's heating element located at the base of the unit.
description: The Zenco Duo Glassware serves as the primary accessory for containing vapour from the Zenco Duo's heating element located at the base of the unit. Made of borosilicate glass, it is easily cleaned and includes a removable food-grade silicone diffuser for smoother and more flavorful vapour. Its design is not only aesthetically pleasing, but also ideal for extended use. Additionally, the Zenco Duo Glass is dishwasher-safe, simplifying the cleaning process. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
